actionUnits.condition: Cause any other Collider with a Rigidbody to ENTER the Elevator's BoxCollider (IsTrigger=1) so Unity physics invokes AttachToElevator.OnTriggerEnter on Elevator. Script: AttachToElevator (MonoBehaviour fileID=4942415221793979109, m_Script guid=077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77). Note: Scene shows 'player' field is null; and the code checks if (gameObject == player), so the SetParent branch will not execute unless the 'player' reference equals this Elevator.

Cause the same Rigidbody collider to EXIT the Elevator's BoxCollider so Unity physics invokes AttachToElevator.OnTriggerExit on Elevator. Script: AttachToElevator (MonoBehaviour fileID=4942415221793979109). Note: Due to the same (gameObject == player) check and null 'player' reference, the 'player.transform.parent = null' branch will not execute unless the 'player' reference equals this Elevator.
